# Garlic Butter Shrimp

A quick weeknight dinner ready in 15 minutes.

## Ingredients

- 1 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
- 4 cloves garlic, minced
- 3 tbsp butter
- 1 tbsp olive oil
- 1/4 tsp red pepper flakes
- 2 tbsp fresh parsley, chopped
- 1 lemon, juiced
- Salt and pepper to taste

## Instructions

1. Heat olive oil and 1 tbsp butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add shrimp in a single layer and cook 2 minutes per side until pink.
3. Remove shrimp and set aside.
4. Reduce heat to medium. Add remaining butter and garlic, cook 1 minute.
5. Add red pepper flakes and lemon juice, stir to combine.
6. Return shrimp to the pan, toss to coat.
7. Garnish with parsley and serve immediately.

Serves 4.
